positive_prompt: medieval castle panorama, towering stone walls; turrets + battlements, wooden drawbridge, torchlight glow; dark forest, moody sky; cinematic atmosphere, photoreal, high-detail

verification_prompt: zamek style, medieval castle panorama, towering stone walls, sharp, photoreal, no blur, no oversaturation, no duplicates, no floating objects
